title: Bedrock Thinks Freely
description:
Suggestions, or tips.
Alternatives to FTB mods...
body:
# About
> A project aimed at replacing the FTB mods used in modpacks with mods found in Modrinth.\
> Includes replacements for Quest, Chunks, Teams, Ranks, Essentials, and Ultimine.
> 
> This project has nothing to do with Bedrock Edition. (´・ω・｀)
# Pack Type
**_This pack is primarily made using mods with open source licenses._**

This modpack comes in three forms.
Each has a different core mod.

> ## Common
> A collection of FTB mod alternatives.
> 

|Mod|Overview|
|:-:|:----:|
|Questify(1.20.1only)|Alternative to FTB Quests. Supports import from FTB Quests. It is currently under active development.|
|Xaero's World Map/Minimap & Open Parties and Claims|Alternatives to FTB Chunks(& Teams). To use the OPAC function with map mods other than Xaero, an add-on is required.|
|Luckperms|Alternative to FTB Ranks. Compatible with Open Parties and Claims and Essentials mods. Server side only.|
|Henny Essentials or Solstice Essentials( or Essential Commands)|Alternatives to FTB Essentials. The ones that are compatible with Luckperms are selected.|
|Liteminer|Alternative to FTB Ultimine. |
|Advanced Backups|Alternative to FTB Backups.|

> ## Odyssey
> A version based on the Terrarium Odyssey project.\
> Check the docs.https://docs.terrarium.earth

|Mod|Overview|
|:-:|:----:|
|Odyssey Quests(Heracles)|Alternative to FTB Quests.Supports import from FTB Quests.`*`|
|Odyssey Claims(Cadmus)|Alternative to FTB Chunks.|
|Odyssey Allies(Argonauts)|Alternative to FTB Teams.|
|Odyssey Roles(Prometheus)|Alternative to FTB Ranks.|
|Solstice Essentials or Essential Commands|Alternatives to FTB Essentials.|
|Liteminer|Alternative to FTB Ultimine.|
|Advanced Backups|Alternative to FTB Backups.|

`*` You must use Odysseus for the conversion.
https://github.com/terrarium-earth/odysseus

> ## Director
> Downloading FTB mods from CF using [AutoPack-Director](https://modrinth.com/mod/autopack-director).
